name: Cashiers Booth
hints: The cashier's booth has a control console and a trash pile. Search everything carefully.
LOOK TRASH or LOOK PILE to search through the garbage. The console may control the gas pumps.
Search the trash pile for useful items. The control console operates the gas station equipment. NORTH returns to the gas station (room 8).
LOOK PILE/TRASH may reveal items others discarded. Check the console for switches or controls.
notes: Cashier's booth in the gas station. Has a control console and trash pile to search. NORTH returns to the gas station (room 8). The trash pile may contain discarded but useful items.
